description: A flight is full, but an employee is listed for standby travel. The gate agent must clear the standby list if seats become available.

nodes.task_description: After all ticketed passengers have boarded, check for any no-shows.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that two passengers did not show up, freeing two seats.

nodes.task_description: Check the standby list and clear the first person on the list for a seat.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the highest-priority standby passenger.

nodes.task_description: Assign the passenger a seat, issue them a boarding pass, and allow them to board.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully gets the standby passenger on the flight.
